title: software.container Facet
description: Demanded by the software-advisory check (ADR-0080) and a container collector (a registry / K8s pod reader): the CONTAINER-IMAGE form of the deliverable-software dimension, the sibling of software.package. Same dimension, different form — a component's `name` is the image repository and its `version` is the tag, so the one form-agnostic advisory check covers packages and images alike. `digest` pins the exact image (the version's identity); `deliveryForm` is `container`. A projection of the running state (§1.2), observed by a collector; never authored. Single §2.1 write-owner per the software.* convention. Validated at the Projector write path.

containers.description: The container images observed on this entity (host / pod).

name.description: Image repository (the component name), e.g. `nginx` or `ghcr.io/acme/api`.

digest.description: Immutable image digest, e.g. `sha256:...` — the tag's true identity.

origin.description: Development lineage — OPEN: internal | external | vendor.

deliveryForm.description: OPEN form; this facet is the `container` form.
